Our Team — STEAM Teachers Training Platform

STEAM Teachers Training Team has been working together with TRCN and other African higher education teams to support teacher development, professional collaboration, and stronger classroom impact across the education sector.

Former DG, TRCN

Professional engagement and educational collaboration with leadership connected to teacher development, standards, and national education growth.

STEAM Training Team

Our team continues to build teacher-focused learning opportunities that support practical digital teaching and certification growth.

African Higher Education Collaboration

Working together with other African higher education teams to promote innovation, quality teaching, and professional excellence.

Teacher Development Partnership

Shared teacher training sessions designed to strengthen classroom practice, leadership, and modern educational delivery.

Education standards and classroom excellence

Explore four professional education areas that support digital transformation, teaching quality, teacher competency, and international learning impact.

Microsoft Education

Microsoft Education provides professional teaching and digital learning support for modern classrooms by helping educators combine strong pedagogy with powerful technology tools.

ISTE Education

ISTE Education promotes standards-based digital teaching practice for educators and facilitators who want to use technology in ways that truly improve learning.

UNESCO ICT CFT

UNESCO ICT CFT, which stands for UNESCO Information and Communication Technology Competency Framework for Teachers, supports teacher competency development through structured ICT integration.

TRCN Nigeria

TRCN, the Teachers Registration Council of Nigeria, supports teacher professionalism, registration, certification, and licensing while promoting strong teaching standards and professional growth across the education sector.

PISA Education

PISA Education represents international classroom quality, assessment readiness, and learner impact by focusing on how well students can apply knowledge in practical and real-life situations.

Professional Partnership

TRCN and STEAM Teachers Collaboration

For over three years, STEAM Teachers has maintained a meaningful professional collaboration with the Teachers Registration Council of Nigeria (TRCN) in support of teacher development, stronger instructional practice, and improved educational standards. This relationship reflects a shared commitment to building educators who are professionally prepared, digitally confident, and equipped for the realities of modern classroom teaching. Through this collaboration, STEAM Teachers continues to promote structured professional learning, practical classroom innovation, and training opportunities that strengthen teaching quality across schools and institutions. Our engagement with TRCN represents a sustained effort to encourage teacher excellence, support professional ethics, and advance education through continuous capacity building. It also reflects our commitment to empowering teachers with relevant skills, modern teaching approaches, and long-term professional growth that positively influence learners, schools, and the wider education community across Nigeria and beyond.

Coursera-style program page

STEAM ONE — Foundations for Digital Teaching

Start your teaching transformation with a beginner-friendly certification built for modern educators. STEAM ONE helps teachers build confidence in digital pedagogy, improve classroom delivery, and develop the practical teaching skills schools now expect in both physical and blended learning environments.

📘 Beginner friendly 🧑‍🏫 Teacher certification track 🇳🇬 Built for Nigeria and global classrooms

One-time enrollment fee for the complete STEAM ONE beginner certification experience.

✔Foundational digital teaching modules
✔Teaching practice and classroom readiness
✔Certificate pathway and dashboard access
Already have an account? Log In

What you will learn in STEAM ONE

STEAM ONE is the ideal starting point for teachers who want to grow from traditional teaching into confident, technology-supported instruction. Inside this program, learners are introduced to the foundations of digital classroom practice, lesson structure, learner engagement, and professional teaching confidence. It is designed to help educators understand not only how to use digital tools, but how to apply them in meaningful ways that improve teaching quality, student participation, and classroom organization.

This program is attractive for teachers who want a clear, affordable, and professional entry into modern education practice. It gives schools and individual educators a trusted first step toward certification, stronger classroom performance, and long-term growth within the STEAM pathway.

Digital classroom foundations
Lesson planning with technology
Student engagement strategies
Professional teacher growth pathway

Who this program is for

This plan is perfect for new teachers, classroom instructors, education graduates, school support staff, and facilitators who want to begin their professional journey with a strong foundation. It is also a smart choice for schools and education organisations that want staff to start with a structured and practical training model before moving into higher-level certification. STEAM ONE makes the first step feel simple, valuable, and rewarding.

What learners will gain

Participants gain practical confidence in modern lesson delivery, digital communication, learner engagement, and foundational classroom technology use. This makes the program attractive to teachers who want immediate improvement they can apply in real schools.

Certificate benefits

Completing STEAM ONE shows commitment to professional development, improves trust with schools and education partners, and gives learners a recognised starting point for moving into higher certification levels on the platform.

Career opportunities

STEAM ONE supports entry-level teaching roles, school support positions, facilitator opportunities, and stronger visibility for educators building a verified professional profile in the marketplace.

Outcomes after completing STEAM ONE

  • Understand the basics of digital teaching and classroom technology integration.
  • Create more organised and engaging lesson experiences for learners.
  • Build a stronger professional foundation before progressing to STEAM TWO.
  • Improve readiness for school opportunities and verified profile growth.

Where this program can take you

  • Begin a structured teacher certification journey with confidence.
  • Prepare for school-based digital teaching expectations in Nigeria and beyond.
  • Strengthen your value for classroom roles, school support, and facilitator work.
  • Position yourself for progression into higher-value STEAM certification plans.

Begin your teaching growth with STEAM ONE

Choose the beginner certification that helps you build confidence, improve classroom quality, and move into modern teaching with a clear and affordable pathway.

Coursera-style program page

STEAM TWO — Technology Integration for Classrooms

Take your teaching to the next level with a professional program focused on real classroom integration. STEAM TWO helps educators connect digital tools to lesson outcomes, improve classroom workflow, strengthen learner interaction, and deliver more organised, engaging, and technology-driven instruction.

🧑‍🏫 Active classroom teachers 💻 Technology integration focus 📈 Professional growth pathway

One-time enrollment fee for the full STEAM TWO classroom technology integration program.

✔Digital tools for lesson delivery
✔Blended classroom workflow design
✔Teacher dashboard and plan tracking
Already have an account? Log In

What you will learn in STEAM TWO

STEAM TWO is built for educators who are ready to move beyond basic digital exposure and begin using technology with clear teaching purpose. This program focuses on practical classroom application, helping teachers connect digital tools to lesson objectives, improve communication, create interactive learning experiences, and organise stronger systems for delivery, collaboration, and assessment. It is a highly valuable next step for professionals who want their classroom practice to look more modern, effective, and competitive.

For many teachers, this is the level where classroom transformation becomes visible. It helps learners build confidence in blended teaching, increase professional relevance, and stand out as educators who can manage modern teaching expectations with structure and excellence.

Technology-enhanced lesson delivery
Learning management workflow
Digital assessment and feedback
Classroom communication systems

Why this plan matters

STEAM TWO is ideal for active classroom teachers, facilitators, school leaders, and education professionals who already understand the basics and want to deliver stronger day-to-day results. It is especially attractive for teachers who want to improve classroom systems, increase learning engagement, and become more effective in technology-supported teaching. This makes it a strong professional upgrade and a valuable pathway toward the expert-level STEAM THREE program.

What learners will gain

Learners gain stronger command of digital teaching tools, better classroom workflow, improved feedback systems, and practical strategies that make lessons more interactive, efficient, and measurable.

Certificate benefits

STEAM TWO certification strengthens your professional credibility, shows readiness for modern teaching practice, and demonstrates that you can integrate technology into learning with confidence and purpose.

Career opportunities

This level can support classroom advancement, facilitator roles, academic coordination support, school leadership opportunities, and better positioning for recruitment in digitally focused schools.

Outcomes after completing STEAM TWO

  • Deliver lessons with stronger structure, technology integration, and learner interaction.
  • Use digital systems for assessment, communication, and classroom organisation.
  • Stand out as a teacher who can manage blended and modern learning environments.
  • Prepare for advanced progression into STEAM THREE expert-level training.

Where this program can take you

  • Strengthen your profile for promotion and higher-value teaching opportunities.
  • Improve your fit for schools seeking confident digital classroom practitioners.
  • Expand your path into facilitation, training support, and programme leadership.
  • Move closer to expert-level certification and education consulting pathways.

Move forward with STEAM TWO

Choose the professional plan that helps you integrate technology with purpose, improve classroom performance, and grow into a stronger, more competitive educator.

Coursera-style program page

STEAM THREE — Advanced & AI-Integrated Expert Level

Step into expert-level teaching and leadership with an advanced certification designed for future-ready educators. STEAM THREE empowers teachers with AI-supported workflows, advanced pedagogy, data-informed improvement strategies, and high-level classroom leadership skills for modern educational excellence.

🤖 AI-supported teaching 🏅 Expert certification level 📊 Advanced classroom strategy

One-time enrollment fee for the advanced STEAM THREE expert-level certification experience.

✔Advanced digital pedagogy strategy
✔AI-integrated teaching workflows
✔Expert teacher growth pathway
Already have an account? Log In

What you will learn in STEAM THREE

STEAM THREE is the premium pathway for educators who want to lead at the highest professional level. It is designed for teachers, facilitators, coordinators, and education professionals who are ready to work with advanced instructional strategy, AI-supported planning, classroom innovation, and reflective improvement based on data and modern teaching trends. This program positions learners as forward-thinking educators who are prepared for the future of teaching and learning.

Beyond certification, STEAM THREE helps teachers strengthen their authority, visibility, and career value. It is a strong offer for professionals who want to be seen as advanced educators, digital leaders, mentors, and experts capable of driving innovation within schools, training centres, and learning organisations.

AI-supported instruction design
Advanced teacher leadership skills
Data-informed classroom improvement
Expert certification progression

Designed for advanced educators

This plan is best for experienced teachers, instructional leaders, facilitators, administrators, and ambitious education professionals who want premium-level growth. It is especially attractive for those who want to stand out in recruitment, leadership, consulting, training, and advanced classroom practice. STEAM THREE presents a powerful value proposition for educators who are serious about excellence, innovation, and long-term impact.

What learners will gain

Learners gain expert-level confidence in innovation, advanced pedagogy, AI-supported workflows, strategic lesson design, and improvement methods that can influence schools and training teams.

Certificate benefits

STEAM THREE certification positions you as a premium educator, supports stronger professional authority, and helps you stand out for leadership, consulting, training, and expert classroom opportunities.

Career opportunities

This level supports advanced teaching roles, instructional leadership, consultancy, facilitator training, programme management, school innovation support, and long-term professional recognition.

Outcomes after completing STEAM THREE

  • Use advanced digital and AI-supported systems to improve teaching quality.
  • Lead innovation, mentoring, and strategic classroom improvement with confidence.
  • Increase your authority for expert-level education roles and visibility.
  • Build a premium professional profile for recruitment, consulting, and impact.

Where this program can take you

  • Prepare for education leadership, training, facilitation, and consulting roles.
  • Stand out for advanced school opportunities and premium teaching pathways.
  • Strengthen your authority as an educator who understands innovation and AI.
  • Create a stronger long-term path for influence, visibility, and professional growth.

Step into expert-level teaching with STEAM THREE

Choose the advanced certification built for educators who want authority, innovation, leadership value, and a future-ready professional advantage.

Mission and Vision

A platform designed to strengthen teaching, learning, and education collaboration

Our mission is to help teachers and facilitators grow with confidence through structured learning, digital tools, professional standards, and stronger access to meaningful opportunities in education.
